PAGE_ABYSS_SEGMENT_NEW_DESC: The Abyss is a place filled with a community of authors, where you will find a lot of diverse content! It is stored here for a while, and then disappears.
PAGE_ABYSS_PROMOTED_AUTHORS_NO_AUTHORS: There are no promoted authors here yet. Check back later and you will definitely find someone to follow for.
PAGE_ABYSS_PROMOTE_ME_INTRO_TEXT: Show yourself and get new followers! Be the first in the list of promoted authors for
PAGE_ABYSS_PROMOTE_ME_SUCC: Author have successfully added to promoted list in Abyss.
PAGE_ABYSS_PROMOTE_ME_ERROR: An error occurred. Try it later or contact the developer.
PAGE_ABYSS_PROMOTED_AUTHORS_INTRO: Pay attention to the following authors and subscribe to those who will interest you. If you write stories, promote yourself by clicking on the icon above!
PAGE_ADULT_MODAL_INTRO: This content may contain mature content. To continue enter your date of birth.
PAGE_APP_FIRST_RUN_CHOOSE_NO_INET_TOAST: Failed to load story. Check your Internet connection and read story from the Catalog.
PAGE_APP_FIRST_RUN_CHOOSE_NO_INET_NOTE: For the first launch of the application, the Internet is required. Save stories on your device to read them offline.
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_1: Get more free coins every day! Added daily rewards for running the app, registering an personal account, and completing daily tasks.
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_2: Video backgrounds in your stories. Added a unique opportunity to use short looped videos as a background for the story. Add even more wow effect to your stories!
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_3: You can now insert posts from any other blog into your blog post. It has become even more convenient to discuss interesting publications by other authors!
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_5: Users with an active subscription to the app can now see the online statuses of other users!
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_6: Added the ability to log in to the History account using a Google or Apple account.
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_NEW_7: Authors can now respond to reviews for their stories.
PAGE_APP_UPDATED_REVIEW_THANKS: I would appreciate it if you rate this update. Thanks!
PAGE_CHAT_TIP_TAP_TO_CONTINUE: TAP THE SCREEN TO READ MORE

PAGE_NEW_CHAT_NOTE:
Add members to the story (maximum 24) and start creating!

Changes being saved automatically. Hold on the message to edit, insert, or delete it. Hold on the member to edit name, description, and photo. An empty message from the Author adds a gap in the story. A new episode can be added after publication.

When you're done, publish your mistory and it will be available to everyone in the search. Don't forget to share the link to your story with your friends or in our Facebook group!

If the story will be selected by the editors of Mistory, it will be added to the Catalog in order of priority.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_WAY_NOTE_EDIT: Tap here to add members' messages to the first variant of the story ending.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_WAY_NOTE_EDIT_ACTIVE: Further messages of members will be added to this variant of the story ending.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_NO_SOUND_NOTE: At this point, the previously added sound will be forcibly stopped.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_NO_MUSIC_NOTE: At this point, the previously added music will be forcibly stopped.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_LOCAL_NOTIFICATION_T: While reading a story at this moment the reader will be shown a push notification from the selected participant of the story with the text specified below. The push will be hidden automatically after 2 seconds, and the push text will appear in the story as a message.
Enter a message of up to 250 characters

PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_MISSED_CALL_TEXT_CHO: The plot can be developed depending on the reader's choice. The call will be missed automatically after 4 seconds of reader inactivity.

PAGE_NEW_CHAT_PREVIEW_STORY_NEED_INFO_US: To preview the story, fill  in the title, description, and upload the cover.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_PREVIEW_STORY_NEED_INFO: To preview the story, fill in the title, description, author's name, and upload the cover.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ABYSS_ADD_FUTURE_ERROR: You cand do it only with published stories. Change the premiere date of mistory or try again after the premiere.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_FIRST_MSG_ERROR: The story can only start with a message, choice or image. Delete the first item and try again.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_SKIP_WAY_NOTE_EDIT: Tap here to adding members' messages to the combined storyline.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_STORY_SKIP_WAY_NOTE_EDIT_A: Further messages of members will be added below.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_SEND_CC_DESC: Enter how many reviews you want to get for this story and send it to Critics circle. 1 review for 1 point. Points can be earned in the Critics circle by reading the stories of other authors. Points on your account: {{ points }}.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_SEND_TO_CC_NO_POINTS: You don't have enough points to get that many reviews. Earn points in the Critics circle.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_SEND_TO_CC_SUCC: The story was sent successfully. Track your progress on the Critics circle screen.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_DEL_USER_MSGS_TOAST: To delete a member, remove all their messages, images, and calls from the story.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CRITICS_CIRCLE_ALLOW_REVIE: Allow reviews to the story to send it to the Critics circle.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_FORBIDDEN: Your story has not been found in the Catalog or its premiere has not yet taken place. Please try again later.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_INTRO: Promote your story in the Mistory for
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_SUCC: The promotion of your story in the Mistory has begun.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_FAIL: Failed to start promotion. Contact the developer.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_ERR_STORE: Failed to start promotion. Check your Internet connection and click "restore purchases" on the Store page.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_ERR_COINS: Failed to start promotion. Check your Internet connection and contact the developer.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_CATALOG_PROMOTE_ALERT_TEXT: Increase the outreach and activity on your story from the Catalog by promoting it in Mistory. Your story will be displayed on the Catalog, Abyss and Search screens for 7 days. If this story is promoted again, the promotion period will be extended for another week.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_ADD_COAUTHOR_TEXT: Choose which of your followers will be your co-author (must have allowed private messages and co-authorship in the privacy settings). We will create a separate chat for your discussion about this story. In the co-authorship mode, the story can be edited only if there is an Internet connection!
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_ADD_COAUTHOR_CHECKBO: Read the text carefully again and check the box to continue, if everything is clear to you.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_ADD_COAUTHOR_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to make {{ author }} a co-author of this story? He will receive a push notification and will be able to join the writing via private messages and the Mistory Studio.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_REQUEST_WRITE_PERM_T: Ask your co-author for permission to edit this story. A request will be sent to him, which he can accept or reject.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_REQUEST_WRITE_PERM_D: Your co-author rejected or ignored your request. Try it later or write to the co-authors' chat.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_REQUEST_WRITE_PERM_C: Your co-author asks you for the rights to edit this story. Allow it?
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_DEL_COAUTHOR_TEXT: Your co-author will lose access to this story, but you will be able to invite another one. ARE YOU SURE? Enter the word DELETE in the field below to confirm.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_ALERT_DEL_COAUTHOR_AUTHOR_: You want to revoke the rights to this story. Your co-author will be able to invite you back if you change your mind. ARE YOU SURE? Enter the word DELETE in the field below to confirm.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_COAUTHOR_DELETED: Your co-author has removed himself from the list of co-authors and no longer has access to this story. If this happened by mistake, invite him again.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_COAUTHOR_DELETED_SUCC: Your co-author has been successfully removed from the story and no longer has access to it.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_COAUTHOR_AUTHOR_DELETED_SU: You have successfully removed yourself from the list of co-authors of the story. To get access to it, ask the co-author to invite you.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_COAUTHOR_YOU_DELETED: The author of this story has removed you from the list of co-authors!
PAGE_NEW_COAUTHOR_ADD_SUCC: Your co-author was successfully added. Now he can join the writing of the story through his Mistory Studio or private messages.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_COAUTHOR_STORY_DELETED: This story was deleted by your co-author! If this happened by mistake, you can restore it from the Archive.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_COAUTHOR_N: Co-author must be following for you.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_EPISODES: The story consists of several episodes
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_NOTE: By publishing this story, you agree that it can be added to the Catalog, and you accept
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_NOTE_CONFIRM: To publish this story, read and confirm that
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_NOTE_CONFIRM_1: I am the author of the published story, or I have permission to publish it;
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_NOTE_CONFIRM_2: this story does not violate the rules of the Mistory community;
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_NOTE_CONFIRM_3: the story corresponds to the specified genres and the text is written in the selected language.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_GENR: You can specify a maximum of 3 genres for a story.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_EMPT: The story must contain at least 10 messages.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_NO_T: Enter the title of your story.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_NO_D: Enter the description of your story.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_DESC: The description must contain no more than 150 characters.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_FORM_STORY_ERROR_NO_A: Enter the author's name for your story.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_INFO_COLLAB_UPDATE_NOTE: In stories with co-author, all changes are published automatically!
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_TEXT: Your mistory has been published successfully. Increase its outreach and activity of readers in 3 steps:
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_TEXT_UPDATED: Your mistory has been updated successfully. Increase its outreach and activity of readers in 3 steps:
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_STEP_1: 1. Share the link to the story on your social networks and get {{ numReferrer }} coins as a gift for each new reader! Your friend will get {{ numReferred }} coins.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_STEP_2: 2. Add this mistory to the Abyss, where our authors publish their stories. From them, the editorial staff of Mistory selects the most interesting ones to add to the Catalog
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_STEP_3: 3. Get guaranteed reviews for your story by sending it to the Critics circle. The best critics of the Mistory community will read it and write a review.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_UPLOADED_STEP_3_NO_POINTS: 3. Get guaranteed reviews for your story for the points earned in the Critics circle. To do this, you will have to write reviews to several stories by other authors.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_USER_ERROR_DESC_LONG: The member's description must contain no more than 120 characters.
PAGE_NEW_CHAT_USER_NY_TIP: [Your Name] While reading a story, if the gender of the story member matches the gender of the reader's account, their name and avatar will be substituted. All mentions of the "Y/N" in the text will also be replaced.
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_PULSE_NOTE: Your pulse of activity in the community for the last month
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_PULSE_NOTE_FULL: The pulse increases when you participate in the life of the community – read and publish stories, blog posts, leave reviews and comments, invite new readers, create public collections and add stories to them, publish content in the Abyss, etc. Participants with a high pulse are less likely to see ads and it becomes cheaper to perform actions in Mistory for in-game coins. If there is no activity for the last 30 days, the pulse drops.
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_LVL_NOTE: The level of your creativity skill and the popularity of your content
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_LVL_NOTE_FULL: The level increases if readers like your content – they read to the end of the story, likes your content, leave reviews and comments, follow to you and subscribe to your collections, publish stories based on your ideas, etc. The approval of your stories for the Catalog and the completeness of your profile also affects the level. The high level allows you to access features that are only available to app subscribers.
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_REGISTER_ACCOUNT: Log in to your account to earn experience points and grow in levels!
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_ADS_TAPS: Ads are shown {{ proc }}% less frequently
PAGE_OVERDRIVE_REWARD_CHAT_REVIEWS: Reviews are in the begining of the story

PAGE_REWARDS_HOW_TO_GET_1: Log in everyday and get coins free! Their amount increases with everyday app log in during a week.
PAGE_REWARDS_HOW_TO_GET_2: Read the stories to the end to get even more coins!

PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_0: Hi, I am Mistory! The international social network of readers and authors of chat stories! In our Catalog you will find interesting stories specially selected for you by the editorial staff.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_1: Save stories to your Library to read them offline. Create your own collections and subscribe to the collections of other authors!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_2: Open the continue of stories and other features for coins. Get them FOR FREE by watching ads or buy in the Store at a low price!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_3: Register an account, increase your skill level and pulse of activity to open all app features.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_4: You have read all the stories from the Catalog? Do you want more? Look into the Abyss where our authors post their stories.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_5: Follow for your favorite authors and read new stories and blog posts first!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_TEXT_6: Create your own stories, write a blog and become a popular author! Don't forget to add your stories and blog posts to the Abyss!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_CHAT_TEXT_0: Mistory is completely free stories. Be prepared to watch ads from time to time. This will support the authors of stories!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_CHAT_TEXT_1: Read stories offline by saving them to your StoryBank, or add it to a thematic collection so as not to lose it.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_CHAT_TEXT_3: Unlock the entire episode and read it without ads or buy cheap in-app subscription to try all the features of Mistory.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_CHAT_TEXT_2: Share the story with your friends to get free coins for new readers!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_PROFILE_TEXT_2: Tap on your avatar to set a frame for expressing your individuality!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_PROFILE_TEXT_0: Participate in the Mistory community to increase your pulse of activity and creative skill level. You will see fewer ads, and new features will become available!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_PROFILE_TEXT_1: Fill out your profile, set up push notifications so that you don't miss anything interesting. It's increase your skill level!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_TEXT_0: Welcome to our simple and convenient chat story editor. Now we will tell you how to use it so that you can write a cool mistory!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_TEXT_1: First, add the participants of the story. Think over their characters so that the reader empathizes with the characters, and then specify their names, fill out the description and upload photos.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_TEXT_2: Add words, thoughts, or messages from participants to the story. Intrigue from the first lines, but keep in suspense until the last. Give the reader a choice or diversify the story with interactive elements.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_TEXT_3: To make writing more fun, invite a co-author from your list of subscribers to story. You will have a separate chat to discuss the mistory, and you will see all the changes made in real time.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_TEXT_4: When everything is ready, re-read the story again, correct the errors and publish it, specifying the name, description and other parameters. The more interesting you describe your story, the more people will read it. Good luck!
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_COLLAB_TEXT_0: Congratulations on your first story with co-author! All your changes are automatically sent to the server, and your co-author sees your edits in real time.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_COLLAB_TEXT_1: One co-author is in editor mode and can change the story, and the other is in viewer mode. To request editing rights, click the button with pencil icon at the bottom.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_COLLAB_TEXT_2: Discuss all the details of your future story with the co-author in a special chat. You can do this not only in the editor page, but also in the general list of your chats.
PAGE_WELCOME_TIPS_NEW_CHAT_COLLAB_TEXT_3: When everything is ready, the author of the story will be able to publish it so that it becomes available to all readers. After publishing, you can add a new episode or make edits to this story. All changes will be visible to readers immediately!
SHARE_DESC: Read this fascinating chat story from{{ author }} in the app #Mistory 👻 for iOS and Android!
SHARE_MSG_OUTRO: Read this chat story in the app Mistory 👻 for iOS and Android!
SHARE_ERROR: Fail to share the link. Try again later.
SHARE_ERROR_NO_LINK_GENERATE: Failed to generate the link. There is no access to the Internet.
SHARE_ERROR_NO_LINK_GET: Failed to get the link. There is no access to the Internet.
SHARE_ERROR_NO_LINK_NO_INET: Failed to get the link. Try again later.
SHARE_DESC_POST: Read this blog post from {{ author }} in the app #Mistory 👻 for iOS and Android!
ADS_LONG_LOADING: Ads take longer to load than usual. Please wait a bit and it will definitely load!
ADS_FAIL_TO_LOAD: Failed to load the ad in the allotted time. Check your Internet connection and try again.
COPY_TEXT_COPIED: This text has been copied to the clipboard.
MATURE_CONTENT_TOAST: This content is not intended for people your age.
ERROR_NO_INTERNET: There is no access to the Internet or to the Mistory server. Check your network connection and try again.
ERROR_API_NO_DATA: Data could not be retrieved. Try again later.
ERROR_API_REQUEST_FAILED: Failed to complete this action. Try again later. If the error persists, contact the developer.
